title: salix caprea f. subglabra
intro: Salix caprea f. subglabra, also known as the goat willow, is a variety of willow tree that is characterized by its smooth, hairless branches and leaves. The bark of the Salix caprea f. subglabra contains salicylic acid, which has anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. The medicinal properties of this plant have been traditionally used to treat conditions such as arthritis, rheumatism, and fever, while its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive well-being. Salix caprea f. subglabra can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
